title: Data Models
content_html:
Data Models

Documents are organised by root level folders in Docs Viewer:

  1. Shared Patterns for the common conventions used across generated artifacts
  2. Projection Contract for the boundary between canonical source, public projections, Studio projections, and Docs Viewer payloads
  3. Catalogue Scope for public works, series, moments, and catalogue search data
  4. Studio Scope for Studio route data, the Studio docs corpus, Studio docs search data, and Analytics tag source references that still interact with catalogue checks
  5. Analysis Scope for the public Analysis docs corpus and Analysis docs search data
  6. Library Scope for the Library docs corpus and Library docs search data
  7. Config
